text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of summer camp. I'm just finishing
up training with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Okay. Let me get a drink of water first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You seem to be exerting yourself, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You look as strong as ever. What do you think?
Shall we race each other?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to race you, I'd rather do it in a G1
than a place like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this in a formal setting where we can
bring out each other's max potential. I want to
give it everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...You're probably right. You regard me as a
worthy opponent.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Since that's the case, I'll respect your wishes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Get stronger, Brian. I see a bright future in you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The last day of summer camp comes to an end
under the watchful eye of Symboli Rudolf.
